name: 3A7A_puddle_deep
prompt:
First-person walking perspective at chest height approaching a large dark puddle on a park path. The puddle is large and opaque — the dark water surface reveals nothing about what lies beneath, and the depth is completely unknown.

The dark puddle spans most of the path width as the camera approaches. The water is dark and still, showing only the faintest surface reflections. The opacity of the water suggests significant depth — it is not a thin film but a genuine body of standing water.

The deep dark puddle dominates the lower frame. The opaque water surface is impenetrable visually. The path edges beside the puddle are also wet and uncertain. There is no safe way to gauge depth or find a reliable crossing point.
negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
